General.Name: Mountain Alliance AG
General.Description: Mountain Alliance AG, formerly known as Ecommerce Alliance AG, is venture capital firm specialized in growth capital, service company small to medium-sized companies with digital companies from the DACH region. The firm does not invest in the early stage. The firm primarily invests in digitally driven business models, disruptive and scalable business, Technology, digital business services, digital retail, and meta platforms & media. It seeks to invest in Switzerland, Germany and Austria. It prefers to invest between $0.11 million to $1.14 million in the company. It prefers to exit the investment between 4 to 6 years. Mountain Alliance AG was founded in 2010 and is based in Munich, Germany.

0.Name: Dr. Hans Ulrich Tetzner
